description: Tasks A1 + A3: Create TargetDetector interface, DetectedTarget, TargetPinFile, JvmTargetDetector, and Canonical Locator Schema types. These are Level 1 tasks with no prerequisites and can be implemented together as pure additive new files.
steps: Step 1 - Create DetectionStatus enum at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/DetectionStatus.java with values: SUPPORTED, UNSUPPORTED, NONE

Step 2 - Create DetectedTarget record at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/DetectedTarget.java with fields: TargetId targetId, DetectionStatus status, String reason. Factory methods: supported(TargetId, String), unsupported(TargetId, String), none(). The none() factory should use null for targetId and empty reason.
Step 3 - Create TargetDetector interface at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/TargetDetector.java with single method: DetectedTarget detect(Path projectRoot)

Step 4 - Create TargetPinFile at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/TargetPinFile.java with static Optional<TargetId> read(Path bearDir). It reads bearDir.resolve('target.id'). Valid values: jvm, node, python, react (trimmed, case-sensitive). Missing file returns Optional.empty(). Invalid content (empty, whitespace, unknown value) throws IllegalArgumentException. Note: TargetId enum currently only has JVM('jvm'). For this to work, TargetId needs to be extended with NODE('node'), PYTHON('python'), REACT('react') values.

Step 5 - Extend TargetId enum at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/TargetId.java to add: NODE('node'), PYTHON('python'), REACT('react'). Also add a static fromValue(String) method that returns the matching TargetId or throws IllegalArgumentException.

Step 6 - Create JvmTargetDetector at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/jvm/JvmTargetDetector.java implementing TargetDetector. Returns DetectedTarget.supported(TargetId.JVM, 'build.gradle(.kts) found') when build.gradle or build.gradle.kts exists at projectRoot. Returns DetectedTarget.none() otherwise.
Step 8 - Create SymbolKind enum at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/locator/SymbolKind.java with values: FUNCTION, CLASS, METHOD, COMPONENT, MODULE, UNKNOWN
Step 9 - Create LocatorSymbol record at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/locator/LocatorSymbol.java with fields: SymbolKind kind, String name (name is nullable)

Step 10 - Create LocatorSpan record at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/locator/LocatorSpan.java with fields: Integer startLine, Integer startColumn, Integer endLine, Integer endColumn (all nullable)

Step 11 - Create CanonicalLocator record at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/locator/CanonicalLocator.java with fields: String repository, String project, String module, LocatorSymbol symbol (nullable), LocatorSpan span (nullable). Override toString() for deterministic output format like 'repository/project:module[:symbol][@line]'. Add identityKey() method: if symbol non-null and symbol.name() non-null return module+':'+symbol.kind()+':'+symbol.name(); if symbol null or name null but span non-null return module+':'+span.startLine(); otherwise return module. Add static helpers: anonymousName(String module, int startLine) returning '<anonymous@module:startLine>' and defaultExportName(String module) returning '<default@module>'.

Step 12 - Create unit test TargetPinFileTest.java at kernel/src/test/java/com/bear/kernel/TargetPinFileTest.java following existing test pattern (package com.bear.kernel). Test cases: valid 'jvm' pin, valid 'node' pin, invalid pin (unknown value), empty file, whitespace-only file, missing file returns empty Optional. Use @TempDir.

Step 13 - Create unit test DetectedTargetTest.java at kernel/src/test/java/com/bear/kernel/DetectedTargetTest.java. Test factory methods: supported() returns SUPPORTED status with correct targetId and reason; unsupported() returns UNSUPPORTED; none() returns NONE with null targetId.

Step 14 - Create unit test JvmTargetDetectorTest.java at kernel/src/test/java/com/bear/kernel/JvmTargetDetectorTest.java. Test with @TempDir: directory with build.gradle returns SUPPORTED; directory with build.gradle.kts returns SUPPORTED; empty directory returns NONE.

Step 15 - Create unit test CanonicalLocatorTest.java at kernel/src/test/java/com/bear/kernel/CanonicalLocatorTest.java. Tests: construction with all fields; construction with null symbol and span; LocatorSymbol with null name; LocatorSpan with all nulls; deterministic toString(); identityKey() with symbol name; identityKey() fallback to startLine; identityKey() fallback to module only; anonymousName() and defaultExportName() produce expected strings.
acceptance_criteria: All new .java files compile successfully with javac 17
TargetId enum has JVM, NODE, PYTHON, REACT values and fromValue() method
DetectionStatus has SUPPORTED, UNSUPPORTED, NONE values
DetectedTarget has correct factory methods returning proper status
TargetPinFile.read() handles valid, invalid, and missing pin files correctly
JvmTargetDetector returns SUPPORTED for build.gradle/build.gradle.kts, NONE otherwise
CanonicalLocator has toString(), identityKey(), anonymousName(), defaultExportName()
All locator types (SymbolKind, LocatorSymbol, LocatorSpan, CanonicalLocator) compile with correct field types
No existing files are modified except TargetId.java (adding new enum values and fromValue method)
All test files compile and follow existing test patterns (com.bear.kernel package, JUnit 5)
verification: Compile all new and modified source files with javac 17 to verify syntax correctness
Verify the test files reference correct types and follow JUnit 5 patterns
Verify existing TargetRegistryTest.java still compiles after TargetId changes
